identity: Human female druid, young adult, long wavy honey-blonde hair falling past the shoulders, brown eyes, serene calm face.
outfit: Green hooded cloak lined with rust-orange on the inside, a round gold clasp at the throat, simple brown tunic and dress underneath.
weapons: A tall dark wooden staff with a curled shepherd-crook top wrapped in a thin curling green vine with small leaves, held in the right hand.
attackStyle: East-facing. Staff thrust forward in both hands, vines and green leaves spiraling outward from the staff tip toward the enemy.
spellStyle: East-facing. Staff planted vertically, left hand raised with a small glowing green leaf rune floating above the palm.
blockStyle: East-facing. Staff held horizontally across the chest in both hands, hood up, faint green aura.
koStyle: East-facing, kneeling, staff fallen beside her, head bowed, cloak slumped, small leaves scattered around.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm idle. Staff held upright in the right hand, curled top with vines visible, left hand resting on the clasp of the cloak.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Green hood with rust-orange inner lining, long honey-blonde hair, gold circular clasp at the throat, brown tunic, wooden staff with curled vine-wrapped top visible over the left shoulder.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human female druid, young adult, long wavy honey-blonde hair falling past the shoulders, brown eyes, serene calm face.

OUTFIT: Green hooded cloak lined with rust-orange on the inside, a round gold clasp at the throat, simple brown tunic and dress underneath.

WEAPONS: A tall dark wooden staff with a curled shepherd-crook top wrapped in a thin curling green vine with small leaves, held in the right hand.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human female druid, young adult, long wavy honey-blonde hair falling past the shoulders, brown eyes, serene calm face.

OUTFIT: Green hooded cloak lined with rust-orange on the inside, a round gold clasp at the throat, simple brown tunic and dress underneath.

WEAPONS: A tall dark wooden staff with a curled shepherd-crook top wrapped in a thin curling green vine with small leaves, held in the right hand.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Green hood with rust-orange inner lining, long honey-blonde hair, gold circular clasp at the throat, brown tunic, wooden staff with curled vine-wrapped top visible over the left shoulder.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
